notes:
CRITICAL — all clear

[CRITICAL] Scope boundary: `git status --short public/game/audio/` shows exactly 5 modified .ogg files. `git status --short src/` is empty. No .wav files appear in git status (grep returned exit 1 = no matches). audioManifest.js and services/npcSpeech.js not in diff. src/renderer/game3d/ untouched. Scope is clean.

[CRITICAL] Encoder standard (libvorbis preferred): all 5 files encoded with libvorbis, confirmed in receipt notes table. No .mp3 files written. .ogg output only. Standard honored.

[CRITICAL] No .wav mutated/deleted/renamed: verified independently via git status. Zero .wav paths appear in any git output.

[CRITICAL] package.json / package-lock.json untouched: `git diff HEAD package.json package-lock.json` exited 0 with no output. No Node-side audio libraries added.

HIGH — all clear

[HIGH] Decode validation (independent): ran `ffmpeg -v error -i garage_warm_oud.ogg -f null -` and `ffmpeg -v error -i upgrade_unlock_hybrid.ogg -f null -` independently. Both exited 0 with no stderr. Worker's decode_validation PASS claims are confirmed for 2 of 5 files (spot-check per spec).

[HIGH] File sizes match receipt: `ls -la` output matches all 5 after_bytes values exactly — garage_warm_oud 225578, neighborhood_hybrid_ride 225269, quest_focus_hybrid 171189, reward_tarabi_stinger 19849, upgrade_unlock_hybrid 14314.

[HIGH] Sizes are sane for Vorbis VBR at declared target bitrates. Music tracks: 225 KB for ~14-second tracks at 128k target is consistent with libvorbis VBR producing ~112-114 kbps on these signals. Stingers: 19 KB for reward_tarabi_stinger and 14 KB for upgrade_unlock_hybrid are consistent with VBR on short sparse content (the worker's note about 41% muxing overhead on 2.6 s content is plausible). No size anomalies flagged.

[HIGH] Before-state confirmed: git blob hash `e69de29` (the canonical git empty-file hash) on both spot-checked files confirms the pre-encode state was genuinely 0 bytes — matches receipt `before_bytes: 0` for all 5.

MEDIUM/LOW — all clear

[MEDIUM] Receipt accuracy: files_changed (5 paths) matches git status exactly. No files listed that aren't in the diff; no diff files omitted. The worker does not export code, so exports_added is correctly absent. next_agent_suggestions: ["audio-asset-cleanup"] is correct per spec.

[LOW] Orphan desert_discovery.ogg (0 bytes, no .wav master) correctly excluded from scope. Worker did not touch it — `git diff HEAD -- public/game/audio/music/desert_discovery.ogg` exited 0 with no output. This file remains audio-asset-cleanup's problem, as specified.

[LOW] Receipt notes are detailed and well-structured: includes ffmpeg version/config verification, per-file encode table with before/after bytes and effective bitrates, verbatim git status output, size-ratio sanity section, and explicit non-mutation statement. Above the bar.

SUMMARY
All CRITICAL and HIGH checks pass. Worker produced 5 valid, decodable Vorbis streams from the 5 zero-byte .ogg placeholders, honored every boundary constraint, and left the rest of the audio tree untouched. audio-asset-cleanup is cleared to proceed for all 5 basenames.
